meanings.definition: a message that is stated or declared; a communication (oral or written) setting forth particulars or facts etc
examples: according to his statement he was in London on that day

meanings.definition: a fact or assertion offered as evidence that something is true
examples: it was a strong argument that his hypothesis was true

meanings.definition: (music) the presentation of a musical theme
examples: the initial statement of the sonata
a Cadillac makes a statement about who you are
his tantrums are a statement of his need for attention

meanings.definition: the act of affirming or asserting or stating something
(computer science) a line of code written as part of a computer program
a document showing credits and debits
